title: DOM State, Events, and Accessible Interaction · Language Lens: Dom Query Create
summary: Build a keyboard-operable service-status interface whose DOM, focus, announcements, and visual state stay synchronized. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js dom query create increment in an accessible interactive service-status interface. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Query, create, move, replace, and remove DOM nodes with explicit missing-element and ownership handling.
Minimize, verify, update, and audit dependencies while treating install scripts and transitive code as executable supply-chain input.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
